history.content:
<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing right. The cell directly ahead at row 02 column C is lava, so I should not move forward. The safest way toward the goal at row 04 column D is to turn downward and move around the lava.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing down. The cell ahead at row 03 column B is safe, and moving forward takes me closer to the goal while avoiding lava.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column B facing down. The cell ahead at row 04 column B is safe, and moving forward brings me closer to the goal at row 04 column D.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing down, and the cell ahead would be a wall at row 05 column B, so I cannot move forward. The goal is to my right at row 04 column D, so I should turn right to face toward it.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing right. The goal is directly ahead at row 04 column D, and the cell in between at row 04 column C is safe, so I should move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column C facing right, and the goal is immediately ahead at row 04 column D. That cell is the goal and safe to enter, so I should move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
